response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of C/C++ experience (National Instruments, 2007-2008) plus a bachelor thesis project, falling far short of the 5-10 years of professional C++ required. Primary expertise is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang on Linux, not C++ on Windows. No SQL Server/Oracle experience listed, and no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains. Overall profile does not match the mandatory requirements of this role.
strengths: Long software engineering career (~17 years) with broad polyglot experience
Strong testing/TDD background and craftsmanship mindset
Some early C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on engineering tooling
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of professional C++ development
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; primarily MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform focus
